title: Bhaja Bhaja Manasa
lyrics:
pallavi
bhaja bhaja mAnasa rAghavEndram guru rAghavEndram yati rAghavEndram
anupallavi
tungA nadi tIram puNyasthaLa vAsam mantrAlaya kSEtram brndAvana
vAsam
caraNam
dIna jana priya gAnarasa pUrNam prahlAda avatAram kincita rUpam
phAlguNa sangama guNashIla nAmam mrttika kaliyuga paramauSadam
Thunga Dheera viharam
pallavi
tungA tIravirAjam bhajamana rAghavEndra yatirAjam
(tungA)
caraNam 1
mangaLakara mantrAlaya vAsam shrngArAnana vilasita hAsam
(tungA)
caraNam 2
kara dhrta daNDa kamaNDalu mAlam suruciracElam dhrtamaNi mAlam
(tungA)
<<PAGE:198>>
caraNam 3
nirupama sundara kAya sushIlam vara kamalEshArayita nija sakalam
(tungA)
